scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @3dspace/contracts && npm run build -w @3dspace/room-engine && npm run build -w @3dspace/api && npm run build -w @3dspace/web
scripts.openapi: npm run build -w @3dspace/contracts && npm --workspace @3dspace/api run openapi
